titleStmt.title: SII 31.61: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 61. (A.R. No. B 309 of 1938.) MAILAVARAM, JAMMALAMADUGU TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar set up in Śiva temple.

This record is issued in the cyclic year, Virōdhi, Vaiśākha, śu. 5, sunday. On the basis of both internal and palaeographical evidences, it can be assigned to Śaka 1331 and corresponds to 1409 A.D., April 20, Saturday f.d.t. °52.

Records the construction of bhōgamaṇḍapa in a land measuring two haṁkaṇas (aṁkanas) situated on the northern side and gift of wet land measuring one yēdumu to the god Śanita (śanta) Mallaya by Mahamaṇḍalēśvara Kāmayarāja [Rā]mayam for the merit of Dēvarāya, his wifes Hannayam (Queen ?) and Sidhayamanga. At the end of the inscription, the name of the god is engraved.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
virōdhikruttusaṁvvasta(tsa)ra vaiśāka(kha) su(śu) 5 Ā . śrī
manumahāmaṁḍḍalēsva(śva)ṭha(ra)kamaya rājarāma
yaṁgāru dēvarāya mahārāyaniki ha
nnamaya gāriṁkinni siddhaya maṁga(gā)rikini puṇya
mugānusanitamalla(śāṁtamalla)
ya bhōgamaṁḍapamu
vuttaramuṁ veyavepuṭlu
pulamu haṁkanalu reṁḍu Ekaṭi
jēnu yodamu cēma peṭenu .
śrīmayilavarayanaṁdunu
laya
Digital edition of SII 31.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
